visual_description: A woman with blonde hair, wearing a black and floral patterned short-sleeve top, stands in a room with a wooden dresser and a television in the background. She is talking and gesturing with her hands, then turns her head to her right. The scene cuts to a different woman with brown hair, wearing a light blue spaghetti strap top, sitting on a striped couch and talking with her hands.
audio_description: A woman is speaking, followed by a loud, sustained, low-pitched electronic tone.
